title: Trisyngyne carrii
taxonomy: Trisyngyne carrii is classified within the family Celastraceae and the genus Trisyngyne. The genus Trisyngyne is part of the order Celastrales, which comprises a group of flowering plants commonly known as the spindle trees. Further classification of Trisyngyne carrii may involve more specific information at the species, subspecies, or infraspecific taxonomic ranks.
